name: Dive Bar
social_dynamics: Regulars at the bar, low expectations, easy conversation
recommendations: Bring cash
Be respectful to 'locals'

name: Hi-Fi Listening Bar
social_dynamics: Quiet conversation, music is the priority
recommendations: Keep voice levels low
Respect listening rules

name: Indian / Telugu Sports Bar
recommendations: Arrive early for a seat
Great for group bonding

name: Irish Pub
social_dynamics: Communal tables, conversation flows easily, often live traditional music, strangers become friends
cultural_notes: A home away from home. Central to Irish social life and highly welcoming to outsiders.
safety_notes: Risk is mostly related to over-drinking due to the 'homely' vibe
recommendations: Opt for a booth for a quiet night
Great for a solo pint and a book
Engage with the bartender if sitting at the rail

name: Cigar Lounge
social_dynamics: Business discussions, leisurely conversations, shared appreciation of cigars, slower pace
cultural_notes: A space for lingering and enjoying craftsmanship. Often has a sophisticated, quiet atmosphere.
recommendations: Eat a heavy meal before smoking
Stay hydrated
Respect the quiet, leisurely pace of others

name: Barcade
social_dynamics: Friendly competition, groups playing games, quarters on the machines, high scores bragged about
cultural_notes: The perfect blend of nostalgia and nightlife. Popular for dates and solo gaming.
safety_notes: Distraction by games can lead to leaving drinks or bags unattended
Darker corners around machines can be less visible
recommendations: Use cup holders provided on machines
Keep your bag strapped to you
Great for solo players—easy to blend in while gaming

name: Sports Bar
social_dynamics: Game-day energy, strangers high-fiving, focused on screens during plays, lively during timeouts
cultural_notes: The modern town square for sports fans. Big game days are electric and loud.
safety_notes: Potential for 'rowdy' behavior during high-stakes plays
recommendations: Choose a seat with a clear view of the exit
Ignore provocations from rival fans
Arrive early if you want a seat at the bar

name: Latin Bar & Kitchen
social_dynamics: Dancing breaks out, groups celebrating, food and drinks flow together, lively conversations
cultural_notes: Transitions from dining to dancing; can get crowded and hectic as the night progresses.
safety_notes: Transitions from restaurant to dance space can be hectic
Be mindful of children/families earlier in the evening
recommendations: Secure your table early
Keep your belongings close as the dance floor expands
Great for those who enjoy food and movement
